data.name: Moka Love Relive♪
data.detailed_description:
☆☆ 在一畫面中盡享『表情』、『胸部』和『斷層圖』的Live2D性愛模擬遊戲☆☆

遊戲畫面採用了漫畫分格的構圖，分成了『主觀』和『斷層圖』兩個部分。

在『主觀』分格中，可以看到女主角可愛的臉和搖晃的胸部，

在『斷層圖』分格中，可以看到兩人性器纏綿交織的樣子，

所有畫面都以全Live2D動畫即時同步呈現♪

是慢慢逗弄她，還是擠壓她的恥骨尾骨肌……

根據你的攻擊方式，摩卡茶茶美可愛的臉會變得越來越”淫蕩”…！

摩卡茶茶美有時會試圖掩飾自己的『高潮臉』，

但斷層圖分格中，她一直不停地"緊緊地…♪"夾著男性的性器，甜蜜地高潮，這完全暴露了她♪

這是一款純愛H模擬遊戲，不僅能從表情和言語中，更能從斷層圖中感受到親密甜蜜的感覺。

☆☆ 再現了龜頭被陰道褶皺卡住的“咯吱咯吱”感，以及陰道壓力將陰莖壓制的質感，所有細節都完美重現…！！☆☆

憑藉動畫師變態般的技術，

我們實現了幾乎無法透過Live2D表現的“如同漫畫般的陰道壓力表現”。

陰道褶皺會隨著陰莖的龜頭“咯吱咯吱”地變形，

根據摩卡茶茶美的快感程度，陰道甚至會緊繃到將陰莖壓制住♪

此外，根據活塞運動的種類，『插入的角度』也會改變，

例如，如果你選擇【摩擦G點】，

它會向上突進，瞄準【G點】並進行“咯吱♪♪”的運動！

最終，即使只看著斷層圖，也能感同身受，獲得快感，達到那種身臨其境的真實感…！！

更厲害的是，由淺木式配音的“摩卡茶茶美”的呻吟模式也超級豐富♪

插入的位置是【正直入】、【擠壓恥骨尾骨肌】還是【摩擦G點】……

插入的力度是【揉捏般】、【輕頂般】還是【碾壓般】……

我們為每種插入方式和力度組合都錄製了不同的呻吟聲♪

來試試各種指令吧♪

☆☆ 每個故事都有不同的遊戲體驗♪☆☆

這是一款以即時快感為核心的休閒遊戲，你只需要嘗試各種指令就能推進遊戲。

甚至還有『已通關』功能，讓你能夠直接跳到你想玩的故事。

◆故事1：忍耐高潮臉

　【可以嘗試各種指令的基礎模式】

　遊戲中幾乎所有的指令都會逐步解鎖。

　首先，在這個故事中盡情享受各種H吧♪

◆故事2：緊密慢速性愛

　【主觀視角固定在“接吻距離”，一邊耳語一邊緊密性愛的模式】

　因為你們是互相擁抱的狀態，所以只能選擇緊密貼合的活塞運動，如『擠壓恥骨尾骨肌』或『揉捏恥骨尾骨肌』。

　但作為交換，你可以在性愛中進行舌吻。

　舌吻時，所有的呻吟都會變為舌吻版本。

　此外，我們還為故事2準備了許多專屬的耳語對話，

　特別推薦給那些“今天想來一場溫柔的H，一邊聊天一邊親密”的日子♪

◆故事3：甜蜜愛戀式侵犯碾壓

　【體位固定為“蛙式”，可以隨心所欲地侵犯碾壓的模式】

　在這個故事中，新增了『高潮量表』。

　透過持續活塞運動，她的呻吟聲和表情會發生變化。

　每次高潮時，你可以提前選擇是『讓她自己高潮』還是『一起高潮』。

　這樣你就可以一直“用力猛頂恥骨尾骨肌”，讓哭泣的她無法反抗，

　也可以進行射精後不停腰的雄性性愛。

　這是一個沒有結束條件的非停止模式，讓你盡情享受…！！

☆☆ 摩卡茶茶美 【CV.淺木式】☆☆

data.short_description: 一款滿是H場景的Live2D模擬遊戲♪ 擁有無與倫比的陰道褶皺“真實感”，實現了下一代斷層圖表現，以及如同漫畫般動態的“高潮臉”！連續高潮、潮吹、揉胸、蛙式體位時腳趾彎曲，充滿各種癖好♪ 選擇你喜歡的攻擊方式，盡情享受甜蜜親密的H愛吧♪ (CV.淺木式)
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit OS
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 10 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Moka Love Relive♪
data.detailed_description:
☆☆ A Live2D Sex Simulation Where You Can Enjoy the 'Expressions,' 'Boobs,' and 'Cross-sections' All on One Screen ☆☆

The game screen is framed like a comic book with panels for a 'first-person view' and a 'cross-section view.'

In the 'first-person view' panel, you can enjoy the heroine's cute face and her bouncing boobs,

while in the 'cross-section view' panel, you can see the luscious intertwining of your and her private parts,

all with fully synchronized Live2D animation!

Whether you tease her slowly or apply pressure to her pubococcygeus muscle...

Depending on your attack, Mokachami's cute face will transform into a "good face" of pure ecstasy!

Occasionally, Mokachami tries to hide her "orgasm face,"

but the cross-section panel reveals that she's nonstop "squeezing...♪" the male organ with sweet moans!

This is a pure-love H-simulation where the intimate and romantic feeling is conveyed not only through her expressions and words but also through the cross-section view.

☆☆ We've perfectly recreated the "grinding" sensation of the corona catching on the vaginal folds, and the texture of a dick being subdued by vaginal pressure! ☆☆

Through the animator's perverted skills,

we have achieved a "vaginal pressure expression like in manga," which is incredibly difficult to convey with Live2D.

The vaginal folds will "grind" and deform along with the corona of the penis,

and depending on Mokachami's pleasure, she will clench so tightly she can subdue your dick!

Furthermore, the "thrusting angle" changes depending on the type of piston you use.

For example, if you choose [Rub G-spot],

it will thrust upward, moving with a "grind♪♪" right for the G-spot!

Ultimately, the realistic sensation is so intense that you can feel it just by looking at the cross-section view!

What's more, Mokachami, voiced by Asagishiki, has a super-rich variety of moaning patterns!

The thrusting location: [Straight], [Pubococcygeus], or [G-spot]...

The thrusting strength: [Kneading], [Nudging], or [Crushing]...

We've recorded a unique moaning voice for every combination of thrusting location and strength!

Try out all the different commands!

☆☆ A Different Play Experience for Each Episode! ☆☆

This is a casual game focused on instant gratification where you can progress just by trying out commands.

There's even a "Mark as Cleared" function, so you can skip straight to the episode you want.

◆ Episode 1: Enduring the Orgasm Face

　【A basic mode where you can try various commands】

　Almost all the commands available in the game are unlocked in stages.

　Start with this episode to enjoy all kinds of H-scenes!

◆ Episode 2: Close Slow Sex

　【A mode where the 'first-person view' is fixed at "kissing distance" for intimate, whispering H-scenes】

　Since you are in an embracing position, you can only choose close-contact thrusting, such as "Applying pressure to the pubococcygeus" or "Kneading the pubococcygeus."

　However, you can now engage in deep kissing during sex.

　All moans will change to the deep-kissing version during this time.

　Additionally, many whisper conversations exclusive to Episode 2 are included,

　making it the perfect episode for days when you want to have a gentle H-scene, talking and being intimate!

◆ Episode 3: Dominating and Overwhelming Intimate Sex

　【A mode where the position is fixed to "full doggystyle," allowing you to thoroughly dominate and overwhelm her】

　A new element, the "Orgasm Gauge," appears in this episode.

　By continuously thrusting, her moans and expressions will change.

　You can choose in advance for each climax whether you want to "make her orgasm alone" or "climax together."

　This allows you to continuously thrust and pressure her pubococcygeus until she can only cry out,

　or engage in a truly masculine H-scene where you don't stop thrusting even after ejaculating inside her.

　It's a non-stop mode with no ending conditions, so you can enjoy it to your heart's content!

☆☆ Mokachami 【CV. Asagishiki】 ☆☆
